name: Alchemy
description: A digital liver for information. Capture anything — text, links, files. Wait 30 seconds. Check your body (somatic pulse). Reflect. Alchemize. Map it (observation / question / connection / tension / practice). Keep it as a vault note or let it go. 7-item cap. 72h decay. No accounts, no servers, everything local.
author: Isaac Rubinstein
